race.comment: Tricky race. MENESS (7) debuted in a good race at Flemington behind Autumn Charm and struggled but he was in the market there off a poor start when getting into ninth. Expect that form to hold up well, he can do much better this time around. VALLICE (9) was close up in a bunched finish on debut in the feature Donald 2yo maiden and can improve up in trip off a jumpout placing between runs. FRANKEL'S WORD (1) is a colt by Frankel for the Hayes yard with Zahra booked. He looks like he'll get over more ground but respecting. MISS WAITITI (12) is a filly by Circus Maximus who has trialled okay for the Price & Kent Jnr yard, watch the market.
